page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Configure AI providers, speech, translation, and learning preferences

language.helper: Choose the language used across the EchoType interface. This does not change your learning target.

about.appDescription: An English learning app for mastering listening, speaking, reading & writing skills through practice and typing.

dataBackup.exportLibraryDescription: Download all content items as JSON
dataBackup.exportLearningDataDescription: Download records and sessions as JSON
dataBackup.overwriteWarning: Overwrite will delete existing data before importing.
dataBackup.invalidJson: Failed to parse file. Ensure it is valid JSON.

account.title: Account
account.signInToSync: Sign in to sync your data

provider.title: AI Provider
provider.customApiEndpointHelp: Custom API endpoint. Use a proxy URL to route through a third-party service.
provider.apiUrlPathHelp: Change this only if your proxy uses a different path.
provider.noModelApiSupportDescription: Skip dynamic model fetching and use the preset list only. Enable this if the provider does not support the /v1/models endpoint.
provider.providerUnavailableTitle: Unable to fetch models from this provider
provider.providerUnavailableDescription: The service may be temporarily unavailable. Check your network connection and API key, then try again.
provider.maxTokensOverride: Override global setting for this provider
provider.oauthStateMismatch: OAuth state mismatch. Please try again.
provider.tokenExchangeFailed: Token exchange failed. Please try again.

voice.browserDescription: Use built-in system voices with word-boundary highlighting.
voice.fishDescription: Load a much larger cloud voice library for richer narration styles.
voice.kokoroDescription: Use your remote Kokoro server for fast cloud narration with curated voices.
voice.downloadMoreVoicesDescription: Browser voices only show what your operating system already provides. Expand this section if you want to install more English voices.
voice.macGuideDescription: Open Accessibility settings, go to Read & Speak, then download additional system voices from the System Voice menu.
voice.windowsGuideDescription: Install additional Narrator natural voices, then reopen your browser so Web Speech can pick up the new voices.
voice.fishCloudVoicesDescription: Configure your Fish Audio key to unlock a much larger English voice library. Voice playback in chat, Speak, and quick previews can use Fish directly.
voice.fishApiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your Fish Audio API key
voice.browserFallbackWarning: Listen and wordbook screens still rely on browser speech for per-word boundary highlighting. When this source is selected, those views automatically fall back to browser voices.
voice.kokoroRemoteVoicesDescription: EchoType calls your hosted Kokoro server through local proxy routes, so the browser never talks to the remote TTS endpoint directly.
voice.kokoroServerUrlHelp: Defaults to your current AWS Kokoro deployment and can be replaced with another compatible endpoint.
voice.kokoroApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty if your Kokoro server does not require auth

translation.listenDescription: Show translations while listening to content and sentence highlights.
translation.readDescription: Show translations while reading aloud and reviewing the transcript.
translation.speakDescription: Show translations while practicing speech recognition feedback.
translation.writeDescription: Show translations while typing practice content and checking answers.
translation.footer: Listen, Read, and Write start with translation on. Speak starts with translation off. Each module keeps its own current visibility state.

smartCollection.selectionDescription: Select text to translate and add to favorites
smartCollection.autoSaveDescription: Automatically collect words based on practice patterns

recommendations.enableDescription: Show AI suggestions at the bottom of practice pages

shadowReading.enableDescription: Link content across Listen, Read, and Write modules
shadowReading.overview: Shadow reading is a technique where you practice the same material across skills: Listen → Read aloud → Write. When enabled, switching between modules highlights your current content so you can continue seamlessly.
shadowReading.speakNote: For the Speak module, related conversation scenarios are recommended based on your content topic.

pronunciation.autoDescription: Use SpeechSuper when configured, then fall back to AI analysis.
pronunciation.speechsuperDescription: Phoneme-level scoring with a dedicated pronunciation API.
pronunciation.aiOnlyDescription: Use your configured AI provider for text-based analysis.
pronunciation.speechSuperDescription: Get phoneme-level pronunciation scoring. The free tier includes 1,000 calls per month.
pronunciation.summary: Pronunciation assessment runs after each speech input in the Speak module. SpeechSuper gives you phoneme-level IPA analysis, while the AI fallback provides estimated scores and tips based on text comparison.

aiOutput.maxTokensDescription: Limits the maximum number of tokens the AI can generate per response. Lower values save costs and speed up responses. Higher values allow longer, more detailed answers.
